07_gpt2_story_en.name: GPT-2 영문 동화 생성
07_gpt2_story_en.story_en:
A children's story.

Once upon a time, there was a children ' s drawing of a girl digging a hole in the ground. The main character was little girl, digging in park. The mood was happy.

The story begins:
 "Oh what do you think I'm doing?" says Little Girl to her sister – as she brings an apple into play and plays with it until they reach one another (the sound is like that of walking). Then suddenly … something terrible happens! That child will be born from this tree at night during school holidays on day when schools are closed for lunch break… It turns out [Little Boy] has just eaten some apples before dinner which have been stuck by worms inside his mouth since he ate them right after playing ball today."
I don't want your sympathy or advice please stop reading now 🙂

08_nllb_translation_ko.name: NLLB 영한 번역
08_nllb_translation_ko.story_final: 어린이들의 이야기. 한때는 어린이들의 그림으로 여학생이 땅에 구멍을 파고 있었다. 주인공은 공원에서 구멍을 파고 있던 여학생이었다. 분위기가 행복했다. 이야기는 이렇게 시작됩니다. "오, 내가 무슨 일을 하고 있다고 생각하십니까?" 여동생은 딸에게 말합니다. 그녀는 사과를 가지고 놀고 서로 닿을 때까지 놀고 있습니다. (음악은 걷기와 같습니다). 그러다가 갑자기 ... 끔찍한 일이 발생합니다. 학교 휴일 때 학교가 점심 휴식 시간에 이 나무에서 태어날 것입니다.

vision.raw_caption: a children ' s drawing of a girl digging a hole in the ground

story_en:
A children's story.

Once upon a time, there was a children ' s drawing of a girl digging a hole in the ground. The main character was little girl, digging in park. The mood was happy.

The story begins:
 "Oh what do you think I'm doing?" says Little Girl to her sister – as she brings an apple into play and plays with it until they reach one another (the sound is like that of walking). Then suddenly … something terrible happens! That child will be born from this tree at night during school holidays on day when schools are closed for lunch break… It turns out [Little Boy] has just eaten some apples before dinner which have been stuck by worms inside his mouth since he ate them right after playing ball today."
I don't want your sympathy or advice please stop reading now 🙂
story_final: 어린이들의 이야기. 한때는 어린이들의 그림으로 여학생이 땅에 구멍을 파고 있었다. 주인공은 공원에서 구멍을 파고 있던 여학생이었다. 분위기가 행복했다. 이야기는 이렇게 시작됩니다. "오, 내가 무슨 일을 하고 있다고 생각하십니까?" 여동생은 딸에게 말합니다. 그녀는 사과를 가지고 놀고 서로 닿을 때까지 놀고 있습니다. (음악은 걷기와 같습니다). 그러다가 갑자기 ... 끔찍한 일이 발생합니다. 학교 휴일 때 학교가 점심 휴식 시간에 이 나무에서 태어날 것입니다.
